# HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.1
> Ships with [SkiaSharp 3.119.0](../3.119.0.md) · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/HarfBuzzSharp/8.3.1.1) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.0)
> **API changes** · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](8.3.1.1/index.md)

## Highlights

HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.1 ships 7 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Engine

- **Move the WASM fix to SkiaSharp** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3088](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3088))

## API Surface

- **Riscv64 build support** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@kasperk81](https://github.com/kasperk81) ([#3192](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3192))
- **LoongArch64 build support** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3198](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3198))

## Bug Fixes

- **The correct PackagePath attribute** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3100](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3100))
- **Targets for ARM machines** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3190](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3190))

## Platform

- **Move the Blazor workaround into WASM** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3082](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3082))
- **The Android NDK to r27c and update to 16kb alignment** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3096](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3096))
- **Linux tests** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@kasperk81](https://github.com/kasperk81) ([#3194](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3194))
